pr.title: Create Ember's isolated staging backend and wire staging branch to it
pr.rollback: Revert PR. Remove staging env vars from Vercel Staging if desired. No production code or prod secrets changed.

receipt.goal: Staging backend isolation: staging Supabase topology (separate project), schema from repo migrations, Vercel Staging env = staging URL/keys only. No seed rollout, no feature flags.
commands_run: cd web && pnpm install && pnpm run build
qa_steps: Open PR summary in GitHub; review environment matrix and runbook
Perform Supabase/Vercel UI steps in founder-runbook-pr2.md if not yet done
Redeploy staging branch after env changes
Open stable staging URL; confirm site loads
Sign in on staging URL; confirm user appears in staging Supabase Auth only (not prod)
receipt.rollback: Revert PR. Staging env vars in Vercel can be removed; production untouched.
receipt.decision_notes: Supabase staging = separate project (not persistent branch); repo has no Supabase GitHub integration; migrations applied manually; Vercel Staging environment scopes staging URL/keys to staging branch only.
